---
name: Bug Fix
about: Use this template for bug fixes
---

## Issue
Describe the bug and the affected part of the CodeX website (page or API endpoint).

## Reproduction
Steps to reproduce the bug, including URLs or API endpoints and sample payloads.

## Fix
Explain what changed to fix the issue and any trade-offs.

## Checklist
- [ ] Added tests that reproduce the bug and verify the fix
- [ ] Updated any impacted documentation or API contracts
- [ ] Verified local build and manual testing steps

## Notes
Any deployment considerations or required database migrations.
